## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking, fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking, adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (would cause existing behavior to change)
- [ ] Docs / chore / refactor (no runtime change)

## Checklist

- [ ] I added a changeset (`npx changeset`) — required for any user-visible change.
- [ ] I added or updated tests covering this change.
- [ ] `npm run verify` passes locally.
- [ ] Public API additions are documented in the README / docs.
- [ ] I confirmed the new code is SSR-safe (no top-level `window`/`document` access).
